chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No. 107 of 2009 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hearing of case. 1.For orders on CMA No. 974/2022. 2.For hearing of CMA No. 678/2009. 3.For Regular Hearing. 15.04.2024 None present for the appellant. Mr. Umar Lakhani, Advocate for respondent. ********** Appellants’ counsel are not regular and punctual in appearance. As far as last few diaries shows that they were called absent on 11.12.2018, 07.03.2019, 11.02.2022 and so also today. Similarly on the dates in between the advocates appearing for appellants have also requested for adjournment, meaning thereby that they throughout since the year 2009 were not ready to proceed with the matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Aamir/PS JUDGE
